articles.observed_contract: Articles are globally available to eligible Premium-family accounts and support links, images, video, GIFs, posts, headings, subheadings, emphasis, indentation, and lists; publishing exposes the Article under the selected audience; editing a published Article first unpublishes it.

image_descriptions.observed_contract: X documents image descriptions up to 1,000 characters and recommends clear, objective, natural-sentence descriptions, including context for complex visuals.

unstated_constraints: The official Article help page did not state a stable body-word limit.
The official Article help page recommended a relevant header but did not state a pixel size.
The live composer itself recommended a 5:2 header ratio.

account_and_route.obsolete_route_result: https://x.com/i/articles/compose returned page-not-found for the signed-in session

article.title: The ASI Stack: Building Intelligence We Can Inspect, Challenge, and Change

platform_formatting_delta.emphasis: canonical Markdown emphasis was flattened in the draft import
platform_formatting_delta.lists: no list-dependent content required for comprehension
platform_formatting_delta.disposition: Canonical Markdown remains authoritative; the unpublished draft is a compatibility and preview receipt, not the editable source of truth.

header.live_composer_recommendation: We recommend an image with a 5:2 aspect ratio for best results.

residuals: The canonical source is Markdown; the compatibility draft retained heading text but not Markdown heading or emphasis semantics after plain-text import.
The live Article header editor exposed crop and remove controls but no image-description field, so platform header alt-text entry and readback could not be performed.
Audience controls were not inspected because doing so requires opening the publication flow; publication was not authorized.
The observed composer behavior is dated and may change.
non_claims: An unpublished draft is not an external publication or endorsement by X.
Composer acceptance does not prove article accuracy, accessibility, audience reach, or future platform compatibility.
The platform derivative and previews are not canonical source or header authority.
No publish, edit of a published Article, unpublish, or deletion action occurred.
